workflowPreview.ariaLabel: Product workflow preview showing document queue, statuses, and reviewer tasks
workflowPreview.title: Vendor compliance overview

review.title: Reviewer queue
review.task: Confirm coverage dates on Atlas Construction COI before approval.

workflowPreview.reviewNote: Approval is a reviewer action, not a system assumption.
workflowPreview.pauseMessage: Follow-ups pause automatically when a file is submitted.
workflowPreview.verificationRule: Submitted or received does not mean verified.

approvedAutomation.title: Controlled automation
approvedAutomation.copy: Messages will be delivered exactly according to the schedule and templates approved by your team.

noVendorAccounts.title: No login required
noVendorAccounts.copy: Every request includes a secure and unique link that allows vendors to upload files quickly.

humanReview.title: Final approval is in your hands
humanReview.copy: Submitted files will always go through verification. No document will be approved without your knowledge.

problem.title: Never let an important document expire unnoticed again.
problem.lead: The system continuously tracks deadlines, sends approved reminders and routes collected files to the right people. Your team will spot any risk before it becomes a real issue.
problem.microcopy: We do not replace human decisions. We simply automate all the repetitive work around them.

documentReceived.event: Assigned to Anna Kowalska for review

deadlines.title: Expiry dates no longer live in a spreadsheet
deadlines.copy: The system will track every required document and highlight records approaching expiry.

routing.title: Reminders follow an approved cadence
routing.copy: Vendors will get the right reminder at the right time.

review.title: Uploaded files are routed to review
review.copy: The received file is directed to a person who will verify it before it becomes an approved record.

automation.title: The routine work runs automatically. Your team will review the decisions that matter.
automation.lead: Each automation will handle a concrete operational step. Review and approval will stay with your team.

detect.title: Detect
detect.copy: Flag missing, expiring, overdue, and unanswered document requirements.

followUp.title: Follow up
followUp.copy: Send approved requests and reminders with a secure vendor upload link.

escalate.title: Escalate
escalate.copy: Stop the sequence on upload and surface only overdue or high-risk exceptions.

workflow.title: From detecting a missing file to a fully verified document
workflow.lead: Our system tracks upcoming deadlines, contacts vendors independently and manages files at every stage. Your team will step in only when a final decision is required.
workflow.controlNote: Final approval will always remain in human hands. Every submitted file requires verification and will never be approved automatically.
workflow.diagramAlt: A six-step document workflow covering detection, request, reminders, receipt, human verification, and escalation before returning to monitoring.
workflow.diagramAriaLabel: Six stages of the automated document workflow

diagram.ariaLabel: Document workflow diagram from issue detection to a verified record
diagram.exceptionTrigger: When the vendor does not respond or a deadline is at risk.

verified.label: Verified record
verified.copy: After approval, the document and decision are saved in the record's complete history.

detect.label: Detect
detect.title: A document is missing or approaching expiry.
detect.copy: The system will compare active requirements with expiry dates, missing files, unanswered requests, and overdue records.
detect.summary: The system monitors expiry dates, missing documents, and unanswered vendor requests.
detect.next: The approved request is prepared for the vendor.

request.label: Request
request.title: The system sends the approved request and secure upload link.
request.copy: The vendor will receive the exact template your team approved along with a secure link to the required document.
request.summary: The system automatically sends an approved request for the current document.
request.next: The record waits for a response or the next approved reminder.
request.mockupDetail: Secure upload link attached to the certificate request.

followUp.label: Follow up
followUp.title: It follows up on the configured cadence if the vendor stays silent.
followUp.copy: You will use specific days as configurable triggers rather than a mandatory schedule.
followUp.summary: Scheduled reminders continue until the file is received.
followUp.next: A vendor upload stops the reminder sequence automatically.

upload.label: Receive
upload.title: Upload stops the cadence and moves the file to review.
upload.copy: Submission will change the record status but does not mean the document is verified.
upload.summary: The vendor submits the document through a secure link without signing in.
upload.next: A reviewer checks the file before any verified status appears.

preview.confirmation: Upload received. Reminders will stop automatically.

review.label: Verify
review.title: The reviewer verifies, requests changes, or records a decision.
review.copy: Human review will remain the control point to accept the file or send it back for corrections.
review.summary: The received file enters a manual review queue and is never approved automatically.
review.next: Accepted, rejected, and requested change decisions are saved to the record.

escalation.label: Escalate
escalation.title: Exceptions escalate when a deadline or owner needs attention.
escalation.copy: The system will show overdue and high risk exceptions so the right person can take action.
escalation.summary: The system alerts the owner only about overdue, risky, or unresolved exceptions.
escalation.next: The exception returns to the priority view until it is resolved.
escalation.mockupDetail: Deadline at risk. Owner and manager are notified.

preview.note: Deadline at risk. Owner and manager are notified.

productPreview.title: Keep vendor documents moving without manually chasing every single email.
productPreview.lead: Send requests, collect files, review submissions and escalate only the exceptions. Every document will keep a clear owner, strict deadline and complete audit trail.
productPreview.principle: Your team will review key decisions. The system will handle all reminders.
productPreview.imageAlt: Vendor document workflow from request and upload to review and escalation.

automation.title: Requests and reminders will run automatically
automation.copy: Vendors will receive the exact message and secure upload link at the perfect time.

uploads.title: Uploads will stop the chase
uploads.copy: Once a file is submitted, all reminders will pause and the document will move straight to review.

exceptions.title: Only exceptions will reach your team
exceptions.copy: Missing, rejected and expired records will stay highly visible until someone resolves them completely.

benefits.title: Turn a fragile spreadsheet process into a dependable operating routine.

cadence.title: Automated cadence
cadence.copy: Run follow-ups at the intervals your team approves.

exceptionFirst.title: Exception-first view
exceptionFirst.copy: Focus on missing, expiring, escalated, and awaiting-review records.

uploadLinks.title: No-login upload links
uploadLinks.copy: Let vendors submit the requested file in under a minute.

humanReview.title: Human review where it matters
humanReview.copy: Submission stops chasing; your team still makes the final decision.

escalationRules.title: Escalation rules
escalationRules.copy: Notify the owner and manager when a deadline is at risk.

auditHistory.title: Audit-ready history
auditHistory.copy: Keep every request, file, decision, and escalation in one timeline.

roiCalculator.title: Estimate monthly manual follow-up time
roiCalculator.description: Use your own vendor volume and follow-up assumptions. The calculator runs locally in your browser.
roiCalculator.estimateNote: This is an estimate based on your inputs. It does not include the cost of delayed work, audit risk, or document review.

betaOffer.title: Early access for vendor-document teams
betaOffer.lead: For operations and property teams that still track vendor documents across spreadsheets, folders, and email. Join the list to test a focused workflow for deadlines, follow-ups, uploads, and review history.

items.statusView: A single clear view of all missing, expiring and pending documents.
items.manualFollowUp: Less manual chasing thanks to automated reminders and clear escalation paths.
items.vendorUpload: Simple upload links that allow vendors to submit files without creating an account.
items.auditTrail: The complete history of requests, uploads and verification decisions stored in one place.

items.approval: Approval of message templates and cadence.

cta.title: Stop managing documents in spreadsheets
cta.copy: Focus only on what requires your attention. The system will automatically send routine reminders based on your rules, while your team will make the final decisions.
cta.microcopy: Early access is dedicated to teams with an established process, ready to test our solution on real workflows.

betaOffer.pricingNote: Founding pilot pricing starts at $99/month after fit confirmation.

faq.title: Questions teams ask before automating follow-up.
faq.lead: Clear answers on automation scope, vendor access, and how pilots usually start.
faq.contactPrompt: Need a walkthrough for your workflow?

emails.question: Will the app send emails to vendors automatically?
emails.answer: Yes, but only according to the cadence and templates your team approves. You can pause a sequence or require manual approval before messages go out.

approval.question: Does the app automatically approve insurance certificates?
approval.answer: No. The system automates collection, routing, reminders, and record keeping. Final document verification stays with your team.

vendorAccount.question: Can a vendor upload without an account?
vendorAccount.answer: Yes. Each request can include a secure, scoped magic link for the specific document request, so the vendor does not need an account.

noResponse.question: What happens when a vendor does not respond?
noResponse.answer: The configured cadence continues until the deadline you set, then the exception can escalate to the owner or manager.

otherDocuments.question: Can we track documents beyond COIs?
otherDocuments.answer: Yes. The workflow can track licenses, W-9s, safety documents, subcontractor packets, or other recurring vendor requirements.

startSmall.question: Can we start with one building or project?
startSmall.answer: Yes. The pilot is designed around one real workflow first, so your team can validate the process before expanding it.

finalCta.title: Stop treating vendor document management as a memory test.
finalCta.copy: Launch an automated workflow for your current vendor list and see how much time your team will save on daily communication.

pilotForm.title: Join early access
pilotForm.lead: Share the essentials so we can confirm fit and follow up with the right next step.
pilotForm.privacyPrefix: By submitting this form, you agree to be contacted regarding early access. Read our

biggestPain.label: Biggest pain, optional
biggestPain.placeholder: What part of the follow-up process creates the most risk or manual work?

privacyConsent.label: I agree to be contacted regarding early access and I understand that submitting this form does not guarantee final approval.

errors.consent: Consent is required to submit the form.
errors.submit: We could not submit the request. Please try again.
errors.network: We could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

success.title: Thanks — we received your pilot application.
success.copy: We will review your workflow details and follow up by email. You can also book a short call below if you want to walk through your process live.

property-management.metaDescription: A vendor document workflow for property teams that automates approved follow-ups while keeping final compliance review with your team.

hero.title: Track expiring vendor documents without manually sending out every single reminder.
hero.lead: Join our early access list. We will notify you as soon as we onboard more property management teams. We will show you how to streamline reminders, renewals and document verification in one seamless workflow.
hero.context: Built for small property teams still managing vendor compliance in spreadsheets, inboxes, and last-minute reminders.
hero.microcopy: No vendor logins. Your team keeps final review control.
hero.trustLine: Complete control over sent messages · Fast file uploads without logging in · Final approval is always up to you

contractors.metaTitle: Prevent Delays from Expired Vendor Documents
contractors.metaDescription: A lightweight vendor document workflow for contractors that keeps COIs, licenses, and subcontractor documents moving before work is blocked.

hero.title: Automate vendor-document follow-ups before expired paperwork blocks work.
hero.lead: Keep COIs, licenses, and subcontractor documents moving without manually sending every reminder.
hero.context: A lightweight workflow for contractors who need to see what is missing, what is in review, and what can block mobilization.
hero.microcopy: No vendor logins. Submission never equals approval.
hero.trustLine: Approved automation · No vendor logins · Human review

footer.productCopy: Automated vendor document follow ups with human review where it matters.
footer.legalDisclaimer: The product helps teams collect route and track vendor documents. It does not provide legal insurance brokerage or compliance advice and it will not automatically determine whether a document satisfies contractual or regulatory requirements.
footer.tagline: Document follow-ups with human review where it matters.

trustPages.legalDisclaimer: The product helps teams collect, route, and track vendor documents. It does not provide legal, insurance, brokerage, or compliance advice, and it does not automatically determine whether a document satisfies contractual or regulatory requirements.
